All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Action
 
ActionLoader
 
BannerBuilder
A utility class for building and manipulating banner ItemStacks in Minecraft.
BookBuilder
A builder class for creating and managing various types of books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying enchanted books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying knowledge books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying writable books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
A builder class for creating and modifying written books in Minecraft.
BroadcastAction
 
BroadcastSoundAction
 
BroadcastWorldAction
 
BroadcastWorldSoundAction
 
bStats
 
bStats.AdvancedBarChart
 
bStats.AdvancedPie
 
bStats.CustomChart
 
bStats.DrilldownPie
 
bStats.JsonObjectBuilder
An extremely simple JSON builder.
bStats.JsonObjectBuilder.JsonObject
A super simple representation of a JSON object.
bStats.MetricsBase
 
bStats.MultiLineChart
 
bStats.SimpleBarChart
 
bStats.SimplePie
 
bStats.SingleLineChart
 
ChatAction
 
CompassBuilder
A builder utility for modifying and retrieving properties of a CompassMeta ItemStack.
ConsoleAction
 
FileAPI
 
FireworkBuilder
A builder for creating and modifying firework ItemStacks in Bukkit.
FireworkBuilder.FireworkEffectBuilder
A builder for creating FireworkEffects.
FoodBuilder
A builder class for customizing food properties in an ItemStack.
FoodBuilder.FoodPojo
Represents a food effect that includes a potion effect and its probability.
GiveExpAction
 
GiveMoneyAction
 
GivePermissionAction
 
HasExpRequirement
 
HasLevelRequirement
 
HasPermissionRequirement
 
Hooks
Utility class for checking the availability of certain plugins.
InventoryBuilder
 
InventoryBuilder.LockMode
 
InventoryButton
 
InventoryManager
 
ItemAttributeBuilder
A builder class for managing and modifying attribute modifiers on an ItemStack.
ItemBuilder
A utility class for building and modifying ItemStack objects.
ItemBuilderGUI
 
Keys
Utility class for managing and creating NamespacedKey constants used across the library.
Keys.Component
Abstract class defining component keys used for food and consumable properties.
Keys.EffectType
Abstract class defining various effect types as NamespacedKey constants.
LLibrary
 
Logger
 
MessageAction
 
MiniMessageAction
 
ParsedItem
The ParsedItem class parses and represents custom item metadata from an ItemStack.
PlayerAction
 
Requirement
 
RequirementLoader
 
SoundAction
 
StringUtil
 
TakeExpAction
 
TakeMoneyAction
 
TakePermissionAction
 
UpdateChecker
This class is responsible for checking plugin updates by connecting to a specified API.
UpdateCheckEvent
This event is called whenever an update check is finished.
UpdateCheckResult
Represents whether a new version is available or not
UpdateCheckSource
Represents the source from where to fetch update information.
UpdateCheckSuccess
Represents the result of an update check.
UserAgentBuilder
Builds a User-Agent string for the update checker.
Util
Utility class for version checks, text formatting, and platform detection.
UtilsString
Utility class for handling strings, particularly for manipulating item names and lore in Minecraft with support for PlaceholderAPI and color codes.
VersionSupplier
Functional interface to supply the latest version of the plugin.
